content:
1. Converts float temps between C/F/K (via C intermediate) + raises on <0K result. Utility fn.
2. Kelvin >=0 check only on output; invalid inputs (e.g. negative K) pass; always rounds to 2 decimals.
3. Unknown — would need to ask the author.
4. Negative-K inputs; NaN/inf; non-K outputs that imply <0K; pre-3.10 Python.
